meeting_title: Cobalt Plant Industrial + Voxel IT/Network call

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Pilot Voxel on an existing fixed-camera area
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Use an existing fixed-camera area and available site infrastructure to run a Voxel pilot and validate basic performance.

evidence.quote: there are a number of cameras in that area already.
evidence.speaker: Dakota Kendrick <fake.dakota.kendrick@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: That's probably going to be the easiest from an integration standpoint because you have existing cameras there and the supporting infrastructure is already in place.
evidence.speaker: Dakota Kendrick <fake.dakota.kendrick@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Yeah, we have what we need there to support a test.
evidence.speaker: Lane Donovan <fake.lane.donovan@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: But as for the lay-down area, I think maybe it will be good to test you guys' equipment there and see how it works for us.
evidence.speaker: Lennon Sawyer <fake.lennon.sawyer@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Monitoring across dispersed facilities
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Enable monitoring across dispersed facilities using movable camera setups where permanent infrastructure is limited.

evidence.quote: we don't have a closed site. We are working in the desert, you know, it's already, like, under the, like, for 100 kilometers and more.
evidence.speaker: Lane Donovan <fake.lane.donovan@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: The construction moves forward, so the cameras will have to be on a mobile unit with a portable setup in place.
evidence.speaker: Lennon Sawyer <fake.lennon.sawyer@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: whether we might be able to use an alternative setup, because one approach may not be reliable enough for what we need.
evidence.speaker: Reese Dalton <fake.reese.dalton@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: we can use a separate setup for each camera if needed. It adds complexity and cost, but it can be done.
evidence.speaker: Lane Donovan <fake.lane.donovan@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: It's really something we would like to explore.
evidence.speaker: Lennon Sawyer <fake.lennon.sawyer@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Prevent theft/tampering of mobile camera units
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Address physical security for mobile camera units in remote areas to prevent theft or removal of equipment.

evidence.quote: maybe think about maybe how they can help us with mobile units with but as how to secure it from...
evidence.speaker: Lennon Sawyer <fake.lennon.sawyer@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: Theft, because there are some people come and collect it.
evidence.speaker: Lane Donovan <fake.lane.donovan@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: this should be decided by our top management also, about the security of these cameras, how we can install it there and ensure that it will not be removed.
evidence.speaker: Lane Donovan <fake.lane.donovan@cobaltplantindustrial.com>
